spk_a.transcript: Well we only have days, not months.

spk_b.transcript: I have no idea how they got this. I specifically told my staff to destroy everything. I can't imagine...

qa_result.question:
Which of the following statements did the third speaker say? Please choose the most appropriate option.
Candidate statements:
1) Education has been your life's work.
2) Well we only have days, not months.
3) Now I realize it is a difficult task, but we have the opportunity to make history here, and I want all of us to make it together.
4) The truth is, my heart is not in this fight. You know me, I'm not a wheeler-dealer.
5) This education reform bill will easily get passed in the congress with no obstacle.
6) We don't get a second chance at a first impression, Donald. You know that.
options: D. Cannot be determined (insufficient information to confirm)
